text:
miwi        2011-03-09 16:43:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                               pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This library provides Moose types for checking things (mostly strings)
  against syntax that is, or is a reasonable subset of, Perl syntax.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/MooseX-Types-Perl/
  
  PR:             ports/154811
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4266    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/devel/p5-MooseX-Types-Perl/pkg-plist (new)
